experienceLevel.description: The experience level of a position or candidate.

iso8601.description: Similar to the standard date type, but each section after the year is optional. e.g. 2014-06-29 or 2023-04.

jobType.description: The type of job this is, e.g. Full-time, part-time, contract, etc.

masteryLevel.description: One of five mastery levels for a particular skill.
